name: Create Exam Template with Monitoring Indicators
description: Create an exam template named 'Midterm Proctored Exam Template' with the description 'Standard template for proctored midterm examinations with monitoring indicators' on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin). Configure the template with a 'Last Ping Time' monitoring indicator named 'Connection Quality' using a warning threshold of 2000 and a danger threshold of 5000.
